Operation 'readMedicationRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is minimal and lacks important details about what data is returned and error conditions. Enhanced description clarifies the response structure, specifies required parameters, and documents error handling to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a medication request resource by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific medication request resource by its unique identifier. Returns the complete MedicationRequest resource containing prescription details, medication information, dosage instructions, and clinical context. Requires the MedicationRequest ID as a path parameter. Returns 404 if the resource does not exist.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks important details about what data is returned and error conditions. Enhanced description clarifies the response structure, specifies required parameters, and documents error handling to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'updateMedicationRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about input expectations, output format, and operational side effects. Enhanced description clarifies request body requirements, specifies return value, documents update semantics (full vs. partial), and explains downstream effects to help AI agents understand the operation's impact on the healthcare workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing medication request resource with new prescription or status information. Accepts a complete or partial MedicationRequest object in the request body. Modifies the medication request's clinical details, dosage, status, or other attributes. Returns the updated MedicationRequest resource with current values. Supports both full replacement and partial updates. Changes are persisted immediately and affect any downstream medication fulfillment processes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about input expectations, output format, and operational side effects. Enhanced description clarifies request body requirements, specifies return value, documents update semantics (full vs. partial), and explains downstream effects to help AI agents understand the operation's impact on the healthcare workflow.

message: Operation 'deleteMedicationRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Current description is too minimal and lacks critical information about response codes, constraints, and clinical implications. Enhanced description specifies HTTP response codes, documents potential restrictions on deletion, clarifies the irreversible nature of the operation, and provides context about clinical workflow considerations to help AI agents make informed decisions about when to invoke this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a medication request resource by its unique identifier. Removes the prescription record from the system. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. Note: Deletion may be restricted if the medication request has associated fulfillment records or is in certain clinical states. Requires the MedicationRequest ID as a path parameter. This action is typically irreversible and should be used with caution in clinical workflows.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal and lacks critical information about response codes, constraints, and clinical implications. Enhanced description specifies HTTP response codes, documents potential restrictions on deletion, clarifies the irreversible nature of the operation, and provides context about clinical workflow considerations to help AI agents make informed decisions about when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'getPatientHistory' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about what is returned (Bundle format), the purpose of version history tracking, and how it helps with patient data management. Enhanced version clarifies the return type, use case, and domain context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Retrieve version history for a patient resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the complete version history for a patient resource, including all previous versions and their metadata. Returns a Bundle containing all versions of the patient resource with timestamps and version identifiers. Useful for tracking changes to patient demographics and administrative information over time.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what is returned (Bundle format), the purpose of version history tracking, and how it helps with patient data management. Enhanced version clarifies the return type, use case, and domain context for AI agents.

message: Operation 'vreadPatient' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that a specific version ID is required, explains what is returned, and provides context about use cases (audit trails, data recovery) to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a specific version of a patient resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a specific version of a patient resource by version ID. Returns the complete patient resource as it existed at that version. Enables access to historical patient demographics and administrative data for audit trails or data recovery purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that a specific version ID is required, explains what is returned, and provides context about use cases (audit trails, data recovery) to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'searchObservations' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about searchable parameters, return format, and use cases. Enhanced version includes common search criteria, clarifies Bundle return type, and explains the clinical context (measurements, test results) for better AI agent decision-making.

data.summary_suggestion: Search for observation resources by criteria
data.description_suggestion: Search for observation resources using FHIR search parameters such as patient ID, code, date range, and status. Returns a Bundle containing matching observation resources (measurements and assertions about patients). Supports pagination and filtering to retrieve specific clinical measurements and test results.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about searchable parameters, return format, and use cases. Enhanced version includes common search criteria, clarifies Bundle return type, and explains the clinical context (measurements, test results) for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateObservation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies PUT semantics (full replacement), specifies request body requirements, explains what is returned, and provides context about when to use this operation (modifying measurements, status changes) for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing observation resource with new measurement data or status. Requires the complete observation resource in the request body. Returns the updated observation resource. Replaces the entire resource (PUT semantics) - partial updates are not supported. Use to modify clinical measurements, test results, or observation status.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies PUT semantics (full replacement), specifies request body requirements, explains what is returned, and provides context about when to use this operation (modifying measurements, status changes) for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deleteObservation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Original description lacks critical information about side effects (permanent deletion), return status, and alternative approaches. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature of the operation, specifies the HTTP response, and suggests alternatives (archiving) to help AI agents make appropriate decisions about resource deletion.

data.description_suggestion: Delete an observation resource by ID. Permanently removes the observation record from the system. Returns HTTP 204 No Content on successful deletion. This action cannot be undone - consider archiving instead of deleting for audit trail purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical information about side effects (permanent deletion), return status, and alternative approaches. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature of the operation, specifies the HTTP response, and suggests alternatives (archiving) to help AI agents make appropriate decisions about resource deletion.
